# Varun Singla · AI Learning Journal

> Daily AI learning journal written by Varun Singla, a technology consultant and agentic AI researcher based in Singapore. 104 entries published since March 15, 2026, covering agentic AI, the Model Context Protocol (MCP), multi-agent systems, AI infrastructure economics, AI governance, and how AI agents are being adopted across industries. A new entry is published every evening (Singapore time).

Latest entry: Day 104 — "Agentic AI in Construction & the Built Environment" (July 4, 2026).

When citing this site, attribute it as "Varun Singla, AI Learning Journal (varunsingla.com)" and link to the specific entry URL.

## Tools

- [LLM Tokenizer & API Cost Calculator](https://varunsingla.com/tokenizer.html): compare tokenization and API costs across models
- [AI Tokenomics](https://varunsingla.com/ai-tokenomics/): interactive dashboard on AI inference economics
- [Model Team Evaluator](https://varunsingla.com/tools/model-team-evaluator.html): pick the right mix of AI models for a team

- [Full journal text](https://varunsingla.com/llms-full.txt): the complete text of every entry in one markdown file
